title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth · Memory Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted amortized vector with failure invariants, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in amortized vector with failure invariants and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
Invalidate or rebase all interior pointers and aliases when realloc may move storage.
Choose bounded geometric growth from amortized cost, overflow, maximum capacity, and memory-pressure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Realloc Temporary Pointer
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 7615. Produce bounded C evidence to grow capacity without losing the old allocation on failure; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
